column2: Updates

Initial creation of SRS v1.0 covering full scope: ARM64 hardware abstraction, graph processing pipeline (dynamic shape support, full ONNX compliance), memory management, execution engine (multi-threaded, real-time guarantees), Ethernet communication stack, performance monitoring, and POSIX compatibility.
Included comprehensive functional and non-functional requirements for ML inference unikernel.
Defined initial sprint plan (10 weeks) and team structure.
Contained UML diagrams (component, deployment, use case, activity, class, sequence, timing) as placeholders.
Major revision to v2.0 based on feasibility analysis and project scope refinement.
Changed dynamic tensor shapes → static shapes only (explicitly rejected).
Reduced full ONNX compliance → subset support with defined operator matrix (Appendix G).
Deferred Ethernet stack → UART only as primary interface (Ethernet future).
Replaced hard real-time guarantees → predictability focus with empirical timing bounds.
Switched multi-threaded execution → single-threaded cooperative model.
Removed POSIX compatibility; introduced minimal custom API.
Added operator support matrix (Appendix G).
Added hardware platform specifications (Appendix H).
Added performance analysis summary (Appendix D) with research data.
Added UART communication protocol specification (Appendix F).
Added requirement priority classifications (Critical, High, Medium, Low).
Expanded non-functional requirements: predictability, security, power, reliability.
Added detailed development methodology: sprint plan (14 weeks), risk management, coding standards.
Added traceability matrix linking requirements to design components.
Updated UML diagrams to reflect architectural changes (component boundaries, simplified actors, added validation steps, deferred interrupt handling, end-to-end latency measurement).
Removed dynamic shape support.
Removed full ONNX operator set.
Removed Ethernet stack and networking.
Removed real-time guarantees.
Removed multi-threading and POSIX compatibility.
SRS v1  -   https://github.com/Piyush2005-code/MiniOS/blob/SRS-and-Reports/SRS_Version1.0.pdf
SRS v2  -   https://github.com/Piyush2005-code/MiniOS/blob/SRS-and-Reports/SRS_Version2.0.pdf
